title: amphicosmia laevis
intro: Amphicosmia laevis, also known as the smooth amphicosmia, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the tropical forests of New Guinea. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues and reducing fever, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Amphicosmia laevis can be prepared as a decoction, a tea made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water, or as a tincture, a concentrated liquid extract that can be added to medicinal preparations.
